title: A Very Special Function for LTIC Systems: The Everlasting Exponential e^{st}
summary: This page introduces the everlasting exponential e^{st} as a characteristic function (eigenfunction) of LTIC systems. It derives that the response to e^{st} is H(s)e^{st}, defines H(s) as the transfer function via an integral over the impulse response, and notes the associated region of convergence.
